item.title: iNaturalist Sightings 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison built a tool to view his iNaturalist observations from two accounts grouped by time and location. He created a Python CLI to fetch and 'clump' observations within 2 hours and 5km, then set up a Git scraping repository to run it and store results as JSON on GitHub. Finally, he used Claude Code on his phone to build an HTML app that fetches the JSON and displays thumbnails with lazy loading, showing large images in a modal on click.
标签: iNaturalist, Python, CLI, Git scraping, Claude Code, generative AI, LLM, tools, web app, data visualization

item.title: Tim Cook’s Clever Solution to the Tariff Refund Puzzle 摘要
item.description:
Apple CEO Tim Cook has devised a politically astute solution to the tariff refund puzzle following the Supreme Court's ruling that certain Trump-era tariffs were illegal. During an earnings call, Cook outlined that Apple would seek refunds through established processes and commit any refunded amounts to new U.S. investments in innovation and advanced manufacturing, beyond existing commitments. This approach allows Apple to recover billions while appeasing the Trump administration by framing the refunds as reinvestment in the U.S. economy, turning a potential political liability into a strategic PR move.
标签: Apple, tariffs, Tim Cook, Supreme Court, US politics, manufacturing, trade policy, corporate strategy, Trump administration, refunds

item.title: Meta Solved Their Problem With Kenyan Contractors Seeing Footage of AI Glasses Wearers on the Toilet 摘要
item.description:
Meta canceled its contract with Sama, a Kenyan company hired to review video footage from Meta's AI glasses, shortly after workers revealed they had to view graphic content including users undressing, having sex, and using the toilet. Meta claims Sama did not meet standards, but critics argue the real issue was workers speaking out about the privacy-invasive work. The incident highlights the hidden human labor behind AI training and Meta's failure to disclose such practices to consumers.
标签: Meta, AI, privacy, Kenya, contractors, smart glasses, data labeling, ethics, labor, surveillance
